testsuite.name: Registration

testcase.name: Successful registration

failure.message: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to have text "Registered". Current text: "Registration failed". (tried for 5 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.18' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.139, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\jenny\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:49222}, goog:processID: 4964, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:49222/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.139, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 220294af057f216d56a51e2bfe9f72f5

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to have text "Registered". Current text: "Registration failed". testsuite.system-out:
@registration ?[1mScenario:?[22m Successful registration ?[90m# src/test/resources/features/registration.feature:4?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser launcher Chrome browser?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.HomePageSteps.user_launcher_Chrome_browser()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mUser opens ilcarro HomePage?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.HomePageSteps.opens_ilcarro_HomePage()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser clicks on Sign Up link?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.click_on_sign_up_link()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser enters data?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.entersData()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mCheck the box to agree to the terms of use and privacy policy?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.check_the_box_to_agree()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser click on Yalla button?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.clickOnYalla()?[39m ?[31mâœ˜?[39m ?[31m?[1mThen ?[22mUser verifies that the success message is displayed?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.success_Message()?[39m ?[31morg.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to have text "Registered". Current text: "Registration failed".?[39m ?[31m(tried for 5 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval)?[39m ?[31mBuild info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534'?[39m ?[31mSystem info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.18'?[39m ?[31mDriver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver?[39m ?[31mCapabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.139, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\jenny\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:49222}, goog:processID: 4964, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:49222/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.139, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true}?[39m ?[31mSession ID: 220294af057f216d56a51e2bfe9f72f5?[39m ?[31m at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:85)?[39m ?[31m at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:234)?[39m ?[31m at com.ilcarro.pages.BasePage.shouldHaveText(BasePage.java:49)?[39m ?[31m at com.ilcarro.pages.RegistrationPage.successMessage(RegistrationPage.java:44)?[39m ?[31m at com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.success_Message(RegistrationSteps.java:38)?[39m ?[31m at âœ½.User verifies that the success message is displayed(file:///C:/Users/jenny/Dropbox/AIT/QA/QA67_FirstCucumberProject/src/test/resources/features/registration.feature:13)?[39m ?[36mâ†·?[39m ?[36m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser closes browser?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.HomePageSteps.closeBrowser()?[39m
@existingUserRegistration ?[1mScenario:?[22m Registration with already used data ?[90m# src/test/resources/features/registration.feature:18?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser launcher Chrome browser?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.HomePageSteps.user_launcher_Chrome_browser()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mUser opens ilcarro HomePage?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.HomePageSteps.opens_ilcarro_HomePage()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser clicks on Sign Up link?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.click_on_sign_up_link()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser enters data that already exists?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_data_that_already_exists()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mCheck the box to agree to the terms of use and privacy policy?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.check_the_box_to_agree()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser click on Yalla button?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.clickOnYalla()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mUser receives a message that the user already exists?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.failure_message()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser closes browser?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.HomePageSteps.closeBrowser()?[39m
